description: Frozen reference for the tiny numerical-smoke oracle (tol-regression-tiny; plan §6.3, decision 0005). Captured on the CPU reference platform.

reference_platform.note: captured on macOS arm64 + torch 2.13.0 CPU; CI Linux uses the same locked torch.

policy: Same platform/process must reproduce the fingerprint exactly; other platforms must match `value` within `relative_tolerance` (documented cross-platform boundary, plan §2.4). Tighten once a single reference platform is fixed for the confirmatory freeze.
